meta.title: The Island Without Signal
meta.author: Detective Sim Team
meta.tagline: A storm cuts the island off from the mainland - and someone in the manor didn't want the truth to leave with it.

locations.name: Manor Hall
locations.description: The grand hall is dimly lit by chandeliers. The sound of rain echoes through the shattered windows. Everyone seems tense and on edge.

locations.name: Greenhouse
locations.description: Warm, humid air clings to rows of exotic plants. Rainwater drips steadily through a cracked glass pane overhead.

locations.name: Library
locations.description: Towering bookshelves line the walls. A heavy oak desk sits beneath a portrait that seems to watch the room.

locations.name: Generator Room
locations.description: The air smells of oil and ozone. The backup generator sits silent, its casing pried open.

locations.name: Study
locations.description: A locked, private study. Papers are stacked neatly beside an old security terminal.

characters.name: Iris Vale
characters.description: Quiet and careful. Knows the greenhouse better than anyone on the island.

characters.name: Rowan Ash
characters.description: Blunt and watchful. Has access to every locked room in the manor.

characters.name: Mika Ren
characters.description: Maintains the generator and the dock equipment. First to notice the sabotage.

characters.name: Nora Blake
characters.description: Sharp and persistent. Has been digging into the manor's secrets long before tonight.

evidence.name: Muddy Glove
evidence.description: A torn black glove stained with soil and machine oil.

evidence.name: Poisonous Flower Sample
evidence.description: A rare flower known to cause heart failure symptoms.

evidence.name: Cut Wire
evidence.description: A deliberately severed wire from the generator's control panel.

evidence.name: Torn Letter
evidence.description: A partially destroyed letter mentioning a secret meeting.

evidence.name: Security Log
evidence.description: A printout of the manor's access logs from the night of the storm.

evidence.name: Secret Meeting Note
evidence.description: A handwritten note confirming a clandestine meeting shortly before the storm.

exploreActions.label: Search the potting table
exploreActions.resultText: You find a muddy glove stuffed under a stack of pots.

effects.text: Found a muddy glove hidden under pots in the greenhouse.

exploreActions.label: Inspect the rare plants
exploreActions.resultText: Among the rare flowers, you notice one that has been recently disturbed - a rare poisonous variety.

effects.text: Discovered a disturbed poisonous flower sample in the greenhouse.

exploreActions.disabledText: Iris seems guarded around the rare plants. Maybe build more trust with her first.

exploreActions.label: Inspect the generator panel
exploreActions.resultText: The wiring has been deliberately cut. This was sabotage, not a storm failure.

effects.text: The generator's wiring was deliberately cut before the storm.

exploreActions.label: Search the library desk
exploreActions.resultText: Beneath a stack of papers, you find a torn letter.

effects.text: Found a torn letter hidden in the library desk.

exploreActions.label: Inspect the security terminal
exploreActions.resultText: You pull up the security log from the night of the storm.

effects.text: Retrieved the security log covering the night of the storm.

exploreActions.disabledText: The terminal is locked. You will need access to the study.

lines.text: You're still looking into the generator issue?
Be careful... some things are best left untouched.

choices.text: I just want to understand what happened. I'm not here to cause trouble.
You're hiding something. I can tell.
Tell me about the plants in the greenhouse.

lines.text: There's something about the rare flowers I should tell you... some of them aren't as harmless as they look.

effects.text: Iris hinted that some greenhouse flowers are dangerous.

lines.text: ...I have nothing more to say to you.
Most are ordinary. I keep a few rarer specimens for research, but I'd rather not go into detail.
Everyone's a suspect until the storm passes. State your business.

choices.text: I'm trying to figure out what happened, same as you. Can you help me?

effects.text: Rowan granted access to the study.

choices.text: You're not exactly acting innocent yourself.

lines.text: Fine. Here, this key opens the study. Don't make me regret it.
Watch yourself. I'll be keeping an eye on you.
The generator didn't fail on its own. Someone cut into the wiring, I found it earlier tonight.

choices.text: Do you know who did it?

lines.text: I have my suspicions, but I need proof before I say anything. Check the generator panel yourself.
Excuse me? I've kept this island running for ten years. Don't accuse me.
You're the one investigating the storm night, right? I've been digging too, but some things are dangerous to print.

choices.text: Whatever you know could help me stop this from happening again.
Do you have any documents I should see?

effects.text: Nora shared a note confirming a secret meeting before the storm.

lines.text: Alright... I trust you a bit more now. Ask me anything.

choices.text: Do you have any documents I should see?

effects.text: Nora shared a note confirming a secret meeting before the storm.

lines.text: I don't owe you anything. Ask nicely next time.

cardDeck.description: Draw a card to uncover a new opportunity, event, or clue.

cards.label: Footprints at the Dock
cards.resultText: You recall muddy footprints leading from the dock toward the greenhouse - someone was out in the storm.

effects.text: Muddy footprints lead from the dock toward the greenhouse.

cards.label: An Overheard Argument
cards.resultText: Through the manor's thin walls, you catch the tail end of a heated argument between two guests.

effects.text: Overheard a heated argument between two guests shortly before the storm.

cards.label: The Lights Flicker
cards.resultText: The lights flicker and die for a moment. When they return, everyone looks a little more on edge.

effects.text: A brief blackout put everyone on edge.

caseSummary.premise: Uncover the truth behind the murder and expose the culprit.

leads.text: Someone sabotaged the generator before the storm.
Talk to everyone in the manor and see what they know about tonight.

endings.title: Case Closed
endings.description: You accused Iris of poisoning the victim and laid out every piece of evidence. The case is airtight.

endings.title: Right, But Unproven
endings.description: You correctly named Iris, but your case is missing key evidence. The truth comes out, but doubts remain.

endings.title: Wrongful Accusation
endings.description: Your accusation falls apart under scrutiny. The real culprit remains free.
